entries.statement: Conduct comprehensive AI risk assessments to identify and document technical, organizational, and mission-level risks, including threat identification, vulnerability analysis, and risk prioritization.
Perform AI architecture security reviews and gap analysis to evaluate security controls, identify architectural vulnerabilities, and develop security risk management plans.
Design comprehensive Test and Evaluation Master Plans for AI systems, including test strategy, scope, methodologies, and resource allocation.
Execute AI system testing activities including functional testing, integration testing, automated testing, and acceptance testing to validate system performance.
Manage test data for AI systems, including test data generation, validation, sensitivity analysis of test cases, and protection of sensitive test data.
Conduct threat modeling and assessment to identify threat actors, characterize attack surfaces, analyze threat criticality, and evaluate insider threats.
Establish and operate continuous monitoring programs for deployed AI systems to track operational performance, detect degradation and behavioral drift.
Develop continuous monitoring measurement strategies, performance indicators, and automated reporting requirements for ongoing risk assessment.
Produce AI system design specifications, technical documentation, and architectural records meeting governance and regulatory standards.
Develop system testing procedures, test specifications, testing standards, and quality standards for AI system development.
Create system administration standard operating procedures and implementation guidance for AI system deployment and operation.
Produce AI system model cards, evaluation reports, and quality assurance documentation meeting governance review and regulatory submission requirements.
Develop machine learning and AI code-specific testing and validation procedures, including model behavior analysis and performance metric evaluation.
Produce risk management reports and aggregate risk assessments for senior leadership and governance bodies, including monitoring findings and remediation tracking.
Define and implement quantitative and qualitative risk measurement methodologies, including sensitivity analysis, risk metrics, and performance measurement frameworks.
Establish and maintain enterprise AI model inventory and governance structures, including model registration, risk-based tiering, and lifecycle management.
Develop risk assessment policies, procedures, and frameworks to enable organizational AI risk assessment processes and risk mitigation execution.
Conduct and document test evaluation results, including failure analysis, performance findings, deployment readiness assessment, and technical recommendations.
Assess and document AI system performance characteristics, including reliability, functionality, security, compatibility, and robustness of AI tools.
Appoint and coordinate multidisciplinary AI expert teams to identify, assess, and manage risk throughout the AI system development lifecycle.
Conduct control system risk assessments, including identification of cyber-physical risks, threat evaluation, and development of mitigation strategies.
Develop and maintain AI risk management frameworks, including policies for risk governance, responsibility assignment, and organizational alignment.
Integrate continuous monitoring programs into organizational governance structures, establishing reporting relationships and escalation procedures.
Design and execute exercise scenarios, testing, and simulation activities to assess AI system resilience and evaluate risk mitigation effectiveness.
Establish performance measurement requirements and assessment methodologies for continuous monitoring tools and risk mitigation technologies.
Evaluate threat decision-making processes, threat effectiveness, and emerging threat patterns to inform AI system security assessments.
Develop quality assurance processes for AI products throughout their lifecycle, including validation protocols and quality assessment criteria.
Create assurance cases for AI systems, documenting how systems satisfy stakeholder needs including safety, security, and regulatory requirements.
Assess limitations of machine learning model development and testing methods, identifying knowledge gaps and recommending alternative approaches.
